---
title: "Key Info and Announcements"
date-modified: "today"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Announcements

- Just want to clarify that attendance is still in-person or online
- Jamie Jones will come to Monday's class to discuss PE projects
  - Last 10 minutes of class
  - If you are an MS or PhD student, you can leave Monday's class early
- [Free professional headshots for students!](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf7m1i5h0uyYdkigcBf7Y2mNcliprZKuKr0iTWvJk7WndTZEw/viewform)
- ![](./images/key_info1.png)
- ![](./images/key_info2.png)


## Key Dates

- Lab 1 due 4/12
  - Will update tomorrow
